titleStmt.title: SII 9.287: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 287. (A.R. No. 458 of 1914.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN FRONT OF A HOUSE SOUTH OF THE KALLESVARA TEMPLE AT SOGI, HADAGALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is very much damaged. It refers itself to the reign of the Chālukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva and mentions the Mahāmandalēsvara Barmadēvarasa who bears a number of birudas.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicandracāmaracāravē . traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbha(ṁ)
mūḷastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvī
vallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyā
bharaṇaṁ śrīmattṛbhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamāca(ṁ)
ndrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ
parapuratripuramahēśvaraṁ vikrāntakāntāmanōvallabhaṁ bhayalōbhadurllabhaṁ ripumaṇḍaḷikagaṇḍaśuṇḍā
ḷakaṇṭhīravaṁ parabaḷapraḷeyakālabhairavaṁ . sārakastūrikāmōdaṁ vitaraṇavinōdaṁ māvanaṁkakāṟaṁ
vanagajasūṟekāṟaṁ maleyatuḷivaṁ . gaṇḍaroḷjaḍivaṁ . rūpakandarppaṁ toṇḍamaṇḍaḷikaghaṭasarppa
Arasāsavārikṣētrapāḷaṁ . caturapāṁcāḷaṁ mattagajavirājitāṁgarājaṁ hayavatsarājaṁ kaṭa
kamunniṟivaṁ śauryyamaṁ meṟevaṁ vāṇarāyadiśāpaṭṭaṁ subhaṭamaṇḍaḷikalalāṭapaṭṭaṁ hoysaḷaprabaḷaśai
ḷadurgganirgghātaṁ śrīmattaibhuvanamalladēvadakṣi(kṣa)ṇadōrddhaṇḍaṁ . monemuṭṭegaṇḍaṁ śrīmanma
hāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ barmmadēvarasar śrīvadhugīśanāgi jayalakṣmige vallabhanāgi bhāratadēvi
ge nallanāgi śaśikāśavinirmmaḷeyappa kīrtikāntāvaregāṇmanāgi kamaḷōdbhavanāyuvanappu
keydu viśvāvaniyaṁ svadharmmadoḷa su barmmiga maṇḍaḷēśvaran . śaraṇendu lakṣmabhūpana caraṇakke
ṟagada virōdhibhūpara baṇnisuvudu ka maṇḍaḷikamakuṭacūḍāmaṇiyaṁ
koḷaguḷade kōṭiya maḍidaḍigeḍadāseya maṇḍaḷakaḷakaṁ pariga ta suvenoḍanorvvaṁ naḍenō
ḍuvanoḍane barmmanaipaniṟiveḍaya . hayamanadurttucciyaṁ geysidandaṁ pokku
dōḥ hindōḍida jalappannegaṁ . ntiva
rirdāgaḷa Aribalavettidalli
piriduṁ kiridagurbbi sau
hāsanibhāmaḷakīrtti lakṣmī Āntenisi
pogarttegaṁ negarttegaṁ malladēva sako
sukhasaṁkathāvinōda
di duṣṭanigrahaśiṣṭapratipālanadina
jaya Utta
rāyaṇasaṁktrānti The rest is badly damaged.
Digital edition of SII 9.287 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
